MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HOWARD S. WRIGHT CONSTRUCTION'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED AS TO THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT KAUFMAN WAS THE OWNER OF THE UNIT AND MADE THE REPRESENTATIONS. ALTHOUGH THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT KAUFMAN WAS AN AGENT OF THE OTHER DEFENDANTS, THE ALLEGATIONS DO NOT SUPPORT THE ASSERTION THAT KAUFMAN WAS ACTING AS AN AGENT IN CONNECTION WITH THE SALE OF THIS UNIT. TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. OVERRULED AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON PARAGRAPH SIXTY-EIGHT. SUSTAINED AS TO THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION, FAILURE TO PLEAD FACTS ESTABLISHING A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP WITH THESE DEFENDANTS. THE ONLY CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP ALLEGED IS WITH KAUFMAN, TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. OVERRULED AS TO THE EIGHTH, TENTH AND ELEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION. S.B. 800 DOES NOT LIMIT CAUSES OF ACTION, RATHER IT DEFINES THE APPLICABLE STANDARDS. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
